    get_prefix_max_rec(Nums).

get_prefix_max_rec([]) ->
    [].
get_prefix_max_rec([H|T]) ->
    [H | get_prefix_max_tail(T, H)].

get_prefix_max_tail([], _Max) ->
    [].
get_prefix_max_tail([H|T], PrevMax) ->
    NewMax = max(PrevMax, H),
    [NewMax | get_prefix_max_tail(T, NewMax)].

get_suffix_min(Nums) ->
    lists:reverse(get_suffix_min_rec(lists:reverse(Nums))).

get_suffix_min_rec([H|T]) ->
    [H | get_suffix_min_rec_tail(T, H)].

get_suffix_min_rec_tail([], _Min) ->

get_suffix_min_rec_tail([H|T], PrevMin) ->
    NewMin = min(PrevMin, H),
    [NewMin | get_suffix_min_rec_tail(T, NewMin)].

solve(Nums, K) ->
    N = length(Nums),
    case N of
        0 ->

        _ ->
            LMax = get_prefix_max(Nums),
            RMin = get_suffix_min(Nums),
            find_stable_index_recursive(0, LMax, RMin, K)

find_stable_index_recursive(_, [], [], _) ->
    -1;
find_stable_index_recursive(I, [L|LRest], [R|RRest], K) ->
    UnstableValue = L - R,

    end.

    % Helper function to calculate prefix maximums in O(N) time.
    % Assumes Nums is non-empty based on problem constraints (N >= 1).

        [H|T] ->
            compute_prefix_maxes_helper(T, H, [H])
    end.

compute_prefix_maxes_helper([], _, Acc) -> Acc.
compute_prefix_maxes_helper([H|T], CurrentMax, Acc) ->
    NewMax = lists:max(CurrentMax, H),
    compute_prefix_maxes_helper(T, NewMax, [NewMax | Acc]).


prefix_mins(Nums) ->
    % Helper function to calculate prefix minimums in O(N) time.
    case Nums of
        [] -> []; % Should not happen
        [H|T] ->
            compute_prefix_mins_helper(T, H, [H])
    end.

compute_prefix_mins_helper([H|T], CurrentMin, Acc) ->
    NewMin = lists:min(CurrentMin, H),
    compute_prefix_mins_helper(T, NewMin, [NewMin | Acc]).


solve(Nums, K) ->
    % Step 1: Calculate Prefix Maximums PMax[i] = max(nums[0..i])
    PMax = prefix_maxes(Nums),

    % Step 2: Calculate Suffix Minimums SMin[i] = min(nums[i..n-1])

    ReversedNums = lists:reverse(Nums),
    PMinR = prefix_mins(ReversedNums),
    SMin = lists:reverse(PMinR),

    N = lists:length(Nums),
    find_stable_index(0, N, PMax, SMin, K).

    % --- Helper functions for calculation ---

    % Calculate Prefix Maximums: PMax[i] = max(Nums[0..i])
    % Returns a list of length N.
    pmax_list([]).
    pmax_list([H|T]) ->

    pmax_list_rec(_Max, []).
    pmax_list_rec(CurrentMax, [H|T]) ->
        NewMax = max(CurrentMax, H),
        [NewMax | pmax_list_rec(NewMax, T)].

    % Calculate Suffix Minimums: SMin[i] = min(Nums[i..N-1])
    % Uses scanl on the reversed list, then reverses the result back.
    smin_list(Nums) ->
        % We use a sufficiently large number for initial minimum (since nums[i] <= 10^9)
        Inf = 1000000001, 
        ReversedNums = lists:reverse(Nums),
        % Scanl builds up the list of running minimums from the right (head of ReversedNums)
        RunningMinsReversed = lists:scanl(fun(CurrentMin, X) ->
